noticia.texto_resumido: Fantasy author John Flanagan, 81, died February 7 of complications from non-Hodgkin lymphoma. John Flanagan was born May 22, 1944 in Sydney, Australia. He worked in advertising and wrote TV sitcoms before publishing The Ruins of Gorlan , first in The Ranger's Apprentice series, in 2004. He then wrote The Burning Bridge (2005), The Icebound Land (2005), Oakleaf Bearers (2006), The Sorcerer in the North (2006), The Siege of Macindaw (2007), …Read More
